title: Fernley Dyson
compiled_truth: Fernley Dyson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-04), Fernley Dyson sent 22 and received 269 emails, totalling 291 interactions.
